title: Skill system not wired into TUI or model awareness
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Skills (/qa, /commit, etc.) only work in legacy REPL via /skill command. TUI doesn't support them. Model has no awareness of available skills in system prompt. Need: 1) Add /skill to TUI slash handler, 2) Inject skill list into system prompt, 3) Optionally add skill tool for model invocation.
